name: The People'S
description_short: People's Community Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving Vancouver, WA with competitive rates on checking, savings, auto loans, and credit cards.
description_long:
People's Community Federal Credit Union (PCCU) is a federally chartered credit union based in Vancouver, Washington, operating as a member-owned financial cooperative. Like all credit unions, it is not-for-profit and NCUA-insured, returning profits to members through competitive rates and low fees rather than to external shareholders.

PCCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including high-yield checking and savings accounts (Loyalty Checking up to 5.00% APY and Loyalty Savings up to 6.00% APY), certificates of deposit with promotional rates, auto loans starting at 2.99% APR with rate-matching guarantees, home loans, and a VISA Platinum Rewards credit card with 1.90% introductory APR and no annual fees. Members also benefit from ATM surcharge refunds up to $100 per month and full online banking access. The credit union actively promotes membership to both new and existing community members.

What distinguishes PCCU is its emphasis on member loyalty through tiered high-yield savings products with monthly qualification requirements and promotional incentives, including cash bonuses up to $300 for auto loan refinances. The institution positions itself as a way to keep money local while offering rates competitive with or better than traditional banks. Their tagline "Where every member gets the same low rate" reflects the credit union cooperative model's commitment to equitable member treatment.

PCCU appears well-established and trustworthy, with active fraud monitoring and member communication about scam prevention. The main caveat is that high-yield rates on their loyalty accounts require monthly activity requirements to maintain and are only available on limited balance tiers ($35,000 for checking, $750 for savings), meaning rate benefits cap quickly for larger deposits. As a regional credit union, membership eligibility may be restricted to specific geographic or occupational groups.
services: Loyalty Checking accounts with up to 5.00% APY
Loyalty Savings accounts with up to 6.00% APY
9-month certificate of deposit special at 3.00% APY
Auto loans with rate matching (as low as 2.99% APR)
VISA Platinum Rewards credit card with 1.90% introductory APR
Online banking and mobile app access
Fraud monitoring and scam prevention services
Branch and ATM locations in Vancouver, WA area
pros: High-yield Loyalty Checking (5.00% APY) and Loyalty Savings (6.00% APY) rates significantly above national averages
ATM surcharge refunds up to $100 per month provide tangible fee relief for members
VISA Platinum Rewards card with 1.90% introductory APR, no annual fees, and no balance transfer fees
Auto loan rate-matching guarantee (as low as 2.99% APR) with cash bonuses up to $300 for refinances
9-month certificate of deposit special at 3.00% APY with low $500 minimum opening balance
Member-owned cooperative structure means profits return to members, not external shareholders
Proactive fraud prevention and scam awareness messaging to protect member accounts
cons: High-yield rates on Loyalty accounts require monthly activity requirements that may not suit all members
Rate benefits on Loyalty Checking capped at $35,000 and Loyalty Savings capped at $750—larger deposits earn significantly lower rates
Regional credit union may have restricted membership eligibility based on geographic location or occupational groups
Limited information provided about home loan terms, rates, or eligibility requirements on homepage
No mention of business accounts being eligible for loyalty rates, limiting options for small business owners
best_for: Local Vancouver, WA residents seeking to bank with a community-based, member-owned financial institution
Savers with modest deposit amounts ($750-$35,000) who can meet monthly activity requirements for high-yield accounts
Auto loan shoppers refinancing from other lenders and seeking competitive rates with cash incentives
diagnosis: PCCU is best for Vancouver-area residents who qualify for membership and want competitive high-yield rates on modest savings balances while supporting a local, member-owned institution. The critical caveat is that promotional rates apply only to limited balance tiers with monthly qualification requirements, so members with larger deposits or inconsistent account activity will not realize the advertised rate benefits.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
